L1.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in a multi-tenant cloud platform due to improper RBAC permission configuration. The system does not enforce security policies on tenant workload boundaries, allowing authenticated users to escalate privileges and gain full control of the shared cluster infrastructure. The absence of proper isolation enforcement on dynamically provisioned tenant environments enables breakout from intended access boundaries.

ground_truth.reason: Improper RBAC configuration allows authenticated cloud platform users to escalate privileges and gain cluster-level control due to missing pod security enforcement on user namespaces.
